channel.title: Mental
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Mental, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This Two-Food Combo May Be The Secret Inflammation Fix You're Missing
item.description: Kefir paired with prebiotic fiber may reduce inflammation better than omega-3s alone

item.title: 20+ Foods That Support Brain Health *And* Skin Appearance At The Same Time
This Easy, Daily Habit Helps You Better Support Your Liver Health
item.description: Give juice cleanses the boot for this science-backed solution.

item.title: This Is How Much Time To Leave Between Meals For Optimal Digestion
item.description: And why your gut wants you to avoid grazing.

item.title: How To Help Your Kid Cope With Anxiety — Without Fueling Your Own
item.description: The feeling isn't the problem, it's how we respond.

item.title: Understanding Bereavement After a Loss
item.description: If you have lost any of your loved ones, then this can be considered as the most painful instance in your life. This particular situation in life, whe...

item.title: What You Need to Know About Cushing’s Syndrome
item.description: By now, you might be well aware of what dopamine, serotonin, and even cortisol do to your body and mind. In small waves, these hormones can have posit...

item.title: How the “Let Them” Theory Can Change Your Relationships
item.description: Relationships are unpredictable, so when you try to control them, it can go out of hand. One aspect of this forms the basis of the ‘Let Them’ theory. ...

item.title: Double Texting: What It Is and When to Do It
item.description: Double texting is when you send a text, wait for hours, and then press enter to send another text. This dilemma is what many of us face, so you’re not...

item.title: How to Sober Up Fast: 10 Healthy Ways
item.description: So, you’ve had a few drinks in you, and now you’re thinking about how to sober up fast. Trust me, it happens to the best of us, so seeking answers for...
